headline: Does International Flavors and Fragrances (IFF) Discounted Valuation Unlocks Opportunity?
summary: Heartland Advisors, an investment management company, released its second-quarter 2026 investor letter for “Heartland Mid Cap Value Fund”. A copy can be downloaded here. Mid-cap stocks sharply rose in the second quarter, driven by perceived AI beneficiaries, particularly in Technology. The Fund returned 9.90% in the quarter, compared to the Russell Midcap® Value Index’s 13.40% […]
